panels.title: Quality Score Trend
panels.description: LLM self-assessed quality per draft over time. Upward trend = prompt/persona is improving.

targets.rawSql: SELECT created_at AS time, quality_score AS "Quality Score" FROM "TweetVersion" WHERE quality_score IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(created_at) ORDER BY created_at

panels.title: Pearson r (quality vs outcome)
panels.description: Correlation between LLM quality score and real engagement outcome. > 0.5 = strong signal.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(CORR(quality_score, outcome_score)::numeric, 4) AS "Pearson r" FROM "TweetOutcome" WHERE quality_score IS NOT NULL

panels.title: Auto-Refiner Trigger Rate
panels.description: % of tweets where autoRefiner fired (version count > 1).

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN v > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0), 1) AS "Refiner Fired %" FROM (SELECT tweet_id, MAX(version) AS v FROM "TweetVersion" GROUP BY tweet_id) sub

panels.title: Diversity Re-roll Rate
panels.description: % of tweets where diversity gate triggered a re-roll (version count >= 2).

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN v >= 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0), 1) AS "Re-roll Rate %" FROM (SELECT tweet_id, MAX(version) AS v FROM "TweetVersion" GROUP BY tweet_id) sub

panels.title: High-Tier Tweets Since Last Evolution
panels.description: Count toward the 5-tweet threshold that triggers next persona evolution.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "High-tier since last evolution" FROM "TweetOutcome" WHERE tier = 'high' AND computed_at > COALESCE((SELECT MAX(created_at) FROM "PersonaProfile"), '1970-01-01'::timestamptz)

panels.title: Quality vs Outcome Table
panels.description: Sort by quality_score to eyeball correlation. Use Pearson r stat above for the number.

targets.rawSql: SELECT tweet_id, ROUND(quality_score::numeric, 1) AS quality_score, ROUND(outcome_score::numeric, 2) AS outcome_score, tier FROM "TweetOutcome" WHERE quality_score IS NOT NULL ORDER BY quality_score DESC

SELECT tweet_id, version, ROUND(quality_score::numeric, 1) AS quality_score, LEFT(content, 140) AS content_preview, LEFT(critique, 120) AS critique_preview, created_at FROM "TweetVersion" ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT f.tweet_id, f.feedback_text, ROUND(f.weighted_score::numeric, 4) AS weighted_score, CASE WHEN LOWER(f.feedback_text) ~ '(great|good|love|excellent|perfect|awesome|well done|keep|nice|solid)' THEN 'positive' WHEN LOWER(f.feedback_text) ~ '(bad|wrong|poor|off|stop|avoid|dont|don''t|too much|too long|boring|weak|generic)' THEN 'negative' WHEN LOWER(f.feedback_text) ~ '(tone|style|voice|format|structure|shorter|longer|casual|formal)' THEN 'stylistic' ELSE 'neutral' END AS sentiment, f.created_at FROM "Feedback" f ORDER BY f.created_at DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN LOWER(feedback_text) ~ '(great|good|love|excellent|perfect|awesome|well done|keep|nice|solid)' THEN 'positive' WHEN LOWER(feedback_text) ~ '(bad|wrong|poor|off|stop|avoid|dont|don''t|too much|too long|boring|weak|generic)' THEN 'negative' WHEN LOWER(feedback_text) ~ '(tone|style|voice|format|structure|shorter|longer|casual|formal)' THEN 'stylistic' ELSE 'neutral' END AS sentiment, COUNT(*) AS count FROM "Feedback" GROUP BY 1
SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS "time", COUNT(*) AS submissions FROM "Feedback" WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT weighted_score FROM "Feedback" WHERE weighted_score IS NOT NULL

panels.title: Active Persona
panels.description: Current active PersonaProfile text — what the agent uses right now.

targets.rawSql: SELECT profile_text AS "Active Persona" FROM "PersonaProfile" WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Persona Evolution Timeline
panels.description: All PersonaProfile versions. Click a row to read that version's full profile text.

targets.rawSql: SELECT version, based_on_tweets, is_active, created_at, LEFT(profile_text, 300) AS profile_preview FROM "PersonaProfile" ORDER BY version DESC

panels.title: Topic Blacklist Candidates (bottom 20%)
panels.description: Topics the agent should stop writing about — lowest avg outcome scores. Requires >= 2 tweets per topic.

targets.rawSql: WITH topic_stats AS (SELECT LOWER(TRIM(topic)) AS topic, COUNT(*) AS tweets, AVG(outcome_score) AS avg_score FROM "TweetOutcome" WHERE topic IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2), ranked AS (SELECT *, PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY avg_score) AS pct FROM topic_stats) SELECT topic, tweets, ROUND(avg_score::numeric, 2) AS avg_outcome FROM ranked WHERE pct <= 0.2 ORDER BY avg_score ASC

panels.title: Avg Quality Score by LLM Model
panels.description: Tracks quality across model fallbacks — useful if Gemini 2.5 Flash is unavailable.

targets.rawSql: SELECT l.model, COUNT(*) AS calls, ROUND(AVG(v.quality_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_quality FROM "LlmCallLog" l LEFT JOIN "TweetVersion" v ON v.created_at BETWEEN l.called_at - INTERVAL '5 minutes' AND l.called_at + INTERVAL '5 minutes' WHERE l.call_type IN ('generate','score') GROUP BY l.model ORDER BY calls DESC
